services.title: Open Checking Account
services.description: Opens a new eUSD checking account on the ETO network. Requires tier-1 KYC and verified-human proof.

services.title: Open Savings Account
services.description: Opens a new eUSD savings account on the ETO network. Requires tier-1 KYC and verified-human proof.

services.title: Transfer eUSD
services.description: Transfer eUSD between accounts on the ETO network. Base fee plus 0.1% (10 bps) of transfer amount.

services.title: Domestic Wire Transfer
services.description: Domestic wire transfer with sanctions screening. Requires tier-1 KYC and sanctions.global clearance credential.

services.title: International Wire Transfer
services.description: International wire transfer with travel-rule compliance. Requires tier-2 KYC and travel-rule credential.

services.title: Balance Query
services.description: Query the current eUSD balance of an account. Requires account-holder credential.

services.title: KYC Verification
services.description: Identity verification service. This BPP acts as a KYC issuer and mints a kyc.us-test credential upon successful verification. No prior credentials required.

services.title: 1099 Tax Form Issuance
services.description: Annual IRS 1099 form issuance for interest income and reportable transactions. Requires account-holder credential.
